types.purpose: Accepted source or compiler inputs that must succeed with explicit semantic assertions.
expectedOutputs: declared artifacts and runtime-plan effects where applicable

types.purpose: Rejected input that must fail closed at a source position with stable diagnostics.
expectedOutputs: stable diagnostic IDs and essential fields

types.purpose: Direct HxcIR or C AST construction that proves structural semantics without claiming Haxe-to-C lowering.
expectedOutputs: deterministic structural dump or C/header text
strict native compile/run evidence when C is emitted

types.purpose: Reviewable expected compiler, IR, C, header, diagnostic, or manifest artifacts.
Native compile/link/run, failure-path, sanitizer, and runtime-feature behavior.
expectedOutputs: selected runtime features or explicit zero-runtime proof
strict compiler and sanitizer results where eligible

types.purpose: The same Haxe semantics compared against a declared reference target or oracle.
Headers, symbols, layouts, ownership, calling conventions, and independent consumers.
expectedOutputs: ABI manifest or explicit native-seed limitation

types.purpose: Reproducible compiler, generated-C, runtime, allocation, size, and FFI measurements.

assertions: all owned Haxe sources and macro branches type-check under Eval
production custom-target activation stops at exact source-anchored HXC1001 for the first unsupported typed call
HXC1001 leaves no generated artifact
custom-target lifecycle and platform snapshot
configuration conflicts and legacy Cross fail closed
compiler-server and package-layout isolation
production body lowering reports the first unsupported call as exact source-anchored HXC1001 without output
typed Haxe definitions match every machine-readable catalog entry
structured records are deterministic, source-positioned, profile-aware, and schema-valid
unregistered IDs, absolute paths, and disallowed severity changes fail closed
typed contract report is deterministic across order and compiler-server requests
invalid metadata and declaration graphs emit HXC5002
declaration facts have no runtime or unsafe effect
complete typed modules, declarations, ownership, metadata, fields, and entry point are classified
normalized inventory is byte-identical across captured input order and compiler-server requests
the implementation-only report precedes body lowering, which reaches exact source-anchored HXC1001 without emitting C
two Reflaxe-owned structural renders from unrelated absolute roots are byte-identical and match the complete registered snapshot tree
the direct AST corpus covers declarations, precedence, initializers, control flow, typed GNU attributes, and a structurally guarded header/source split
the reusable argument-array harness records compiler family and version, normalized compile/link/run commands, source hashes, exit codes, stdout, and stderr without host paths
required GCC and Clang native-smoke lanes compile, link, and run every corpus project without hxrt
plan and header renders are deterministic
expected include/forward/complete decisions match
native-smoke independently compiles headers and runs their consumer
C namespaces, exact names, generated defaults, and collision provenance are structural
overloads and generic specializations are byte-identical across discovery order and contain no host paths
typed C name finalization feeds declaration planning without selecting hxrt
one typed neutral compile/link plan drives the raw manifest plus optional CMake and Meson adapters deterministically
raw-manifest, CMake, and Meson consumers compile and run both structural C AST/printer corpora with adversarial quoted paths
Reflaxe ownership removes only listed stale outputs and skips unchanged artifact writes
path traversal, build-language injection, conflicting typed build facts, symlinks, unowned collisions, malformed ownership JSON, and premature lowered-program claims fail closed
canonical HxcIR dumps preserve source-aware semantic order
invalid or unsupported IR paths, including mismatched switch subjects and cases, emit HXC9000 or HXC1001
the Eval side-effect oracle matches the modeled order without claiming C execution
real pinned-compiler typed fields map fixed and ABI primitives plus scalar, reference, and native-pointer nullability identically in both profiles
the machine contract is deterministic and every primitive mapping/conversion has an empty runtime feature set
strict C11 GCC and Clang O0/O2 probes cover widening, narrowing, signed/unsigned bits, NaN, infinity, overflow, negative zero, nullability, and ABI prerequisites
the independent native probe is contract evidence and is not described as Haxe-generated output
the exact pinned Haxe common and capability-gated typed API surface renders byte-identically and contains no host path
every applicable source module and public API resolves to exactly one profile, environment, runtime, diagnostic, implementation, and test owner
unowned modules, stale API overrides, unknown runtime features, missing diagnostics, and evidence-free conformant claims fail closed
the JSON authority and generated review CSV drift together through the central explicit snapshot update path
real pinned-compiler TypedExpr constants, locals, primitive blocks, and returns lower through validated HxcIR before structural C
local names are deterministic and shadowing-safe across discovery order while unsupported and synthetic unreachable nodes emit exact source-positioned HXC1001
portable and metal produce identical runtime-free strict C11 bodies with optional structured #line directives
available local and separately required GCC/Clang CI lanes compile and execute both mapped and unmapped generated-body fixtures at O0 and O2 without warnings
typed primitive parameters, left-to-right direct-call arguments, and implicit conversions are explicit in validated HxcIR

all reachable static functions receive deterministic prototypes before definitions; direct self-tail recursion uses typed temporaries and a loop while mutual cycles compile from deterministic private translation units with -Winfinite-recursion active
default, optional, and rest parameters fail with exact source-positioned HXC1001, while non-hosted executable entry remains scoped HXC1000
portable, metal, and explicit runtime-none production builds emit int main(void), analyzed empty runtime/ABI/stdlib plans, and no hxrt artifact or symbol

typed calls, assignments, static fields, required and skipped lazy operands, ternaries, statement conditionals, nested pre/post-test and range loops, loop jumps, switches, and UInt increments lower into explicit HxcIR instruction/block order
the indexed compound-assignment fixture proves receiver/index/address/load/right/store order before fixed-array representation is admitted
statement and value switch subjects execute once and every emitted C case/default immediately jumps to a typed target without user-observable fallthrough
every effectful load and consumed call is materialized; only total pure expressions over stable values remain inline
portable, metal, and runtime-none production C is byte-stable, warning-clean at O0/O2, runtime-free, and matches the pinned Eval oracle under GCC and Clang
the typed dependency graph records source-positioned reasons and produces dependency-first type order independently of compiler discovery order
class __init__ bodies run in type order before static fields, fields run in source order, and the hosted entry invokes the compiler-owned phase exactly once before Haxe main
deferred globals and initialize-global instructions remain inspectable in validated HxcIR while generated strict C uses zero-initialized storage plus ordered assignments
cross-type cycles fail without artifacts through deterministic HXC1002 paths naming every edge
portable, metal, and runtime-none output remains hxrt-free, warning-clean at O0/O2, and matches the pinned Haxe JavaScript generator oracle under GCC and Clang
typed Int, UInt, and Float arithmetic selects direct C or request-local program helpers without selecting hxrt
overflow, division, modulo, shifts, and bit operations preserve the documented boundary semantics without C undefined behavior
portable, metal, and runtime-none production builds compile and run as strict C11 under the required GCC and Clang lanes, with UBSan enabled where supported
selected helpers are static inline and disappear from optimized output while safe UInt operations remain inspectable as direct C
typed nonempty CArray literals lower to structural C arrays and Span or ConstSpan borrows lower to typed pointer-and-length views without iterator objects
compile-time and loop-guarded bounds proofs remain explicit in HxcIR while dynamic indexing emits a signed and size_t fail-stop check in every profile and build mode
span iteration is an element-scaled guarded index loop whose increment is proven free of signed overflow and whose generated C is byte-identical across profile and build mode
portable and metal runtime-none projects compile and execute as strict C11 under required GCC and Clang lanes with no hxrt artifact, include, library, or symbol
the typed registry validates stable IDs, is byte-identical across discovery order, and rejects unknown or cyclic dependencies with canonical HXC9000 evidence
every root and transitive selected feature retains source-reason IDs while manual constraints cannot add unused code or remove required dependencies
auto, minimal, none, availability, environment, native-only, and reserved-feature policy boundaries emit deterministic HXC2000 evidence
alloc-only and full-string native plans plus the compiler-selected literal-I/O plan package, compile, link, and run exact dependency closures while omitted sources and symbols remain absent
the production compiler retains positive empty primitive plans and selects only runtime-base, status, string-literal, and io for hosted literal output
the private immutable representation admits only shortest-form UTF-8 scalars, preserves embedded NUL and normalization distinctions, and indexes length, access, and slices by Unicode scalar
checked external decoding rejects before allocation while lossy decoding emits one U+FFFD per maximal ill-formed subpart and publishes only valid UTF-8
literal, slice, compare, and hash paths allocate nothing; owned decode, concat, builder growth, and CString copies retain exact allocator identity and failure atomicity
borrowed CString conversion requires stable trailing-NUL storage and an owner-tied lifetime, while both borrowed and owned paths reject embedded NUL without truncation
strict GCC and Clang O0/O2/sanitizer lanes match the pinned Haxe scalar oracle and link no object, GC, reflection, or dynamic symbol family
real typed String literals lower through schema-3 HxcIR into explicit UTF-8 byte-counted C values, including non-BMP scalars and embedded NUL

literal Sys.println and default literal trace select only the dependency-closed runtime-base, status, string-literal, and io feature graph while allocator, full string operations, object, GC, dynamic, reflection, and exception machinery remains absent
portable auto and metal minimal builds emit source-rooted runtime diagnostics, runtime none and freestanding fail closed, and nonliteral or neighboring output surfaces retain HXC1001
generated portable and metal projects are deterministic across output roots and caller working directories and compile and run under strict GCC and Clang at O0 and O2
target bytes match the pinned Haxe Eval oracle exactly, and a closed stdout descriptor proves that hosted output failure cannot return success
ordinary examples/hello/Main.hx compiles through the production custom C target without raw C injection or an example-specific compiler path
the generated executable and the pinned Haxe Eval oracle both emit exactly Hello from hxc followed by one newline
two unrelated generated trees are byte-identical and match the centrally owned readable HxcIR, private-header, C-source, runtime-plan, and stdlib-report baseline

every selected runtime-base, status, string-literal, and io feature retains the one Main.hx source reason while allocator, full-string, object, GC, dynamic, reflection, and exception slices remain absent
required GCC and Clang lanes compile and run the checked-in generated baseline warning-clean at O0 and O2
strict C11 and C++17 compile/link/run with available matched toolchains

hosted and custom freestanding allocator cases prove checked sizes, over-alignment, failure atomicity, identity-preserving ownership, address/undefined sanitizer cleanliness, and no freestanding libc allocation symbols
C and C++ consumers agree on allocator callback types, sizes, alignments, and field offsets
the UTF-8 scalar string contract runs at O0/O2 and under address/undefined sanitizers with explicit CString ownership and selective link inspection
the centrally owned generated hello baseline compiles and emits exact stdout at O0/O2 in each required C compiler lane without requiring Haxe in the native job
independent C-library and opaque-handle C++-shim fixtures run
these native inputs are not described as Haxe-generated output
